name: Rick Tyler
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

In the countdown to
the Iowa Caucuses, Ted Cruz is coalescing courageous
conservatives across the country. On Saturday, Glenn Beck
officially endorsed the campaign and joined Ted on the trail in
Iowa. And just this morning, Texas Governor Rick Perry joined the
#CruzCrew, encouraging Iowa Republicans to #CaucusForCruz.

A week from today,
Iowans will vote for the leader they trust is the most prepared
to lead and defend this nation. If you believe in a prosperous,
free, and secure America, this is our time to elect a tested
conservative who will not simply do what he says, but who will
defeat Hillary Clinton.

Ted Cruz will lay out
a vision that rather than making us less safe and free - as the
Obama-Clinton administration has done - will propel us into a
future where our children will once again have unimaginable
opportunities and where they will be confident that America is
the safest and strongest nation in the world.

Best,

Rick Tyler
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

name: Rand Paul
subject: I won't be silenced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
This Thursday's debate is a big deal.
It's the last debate before the Iowa Caucus
and I want to be on the stage.
This campaign deserves to be on the stage.

We have over 1,000 precinct captains in Iowa
and a huge 500 person leadership team in New Hampshire. We have
spoken with packed crowds in overflowing rooms in all the early
primary states.
We're on the ballot everywhere.
And the latest Fox News poll shows me in 5th
place, just one point behind 4th. We're ahead of Bush, Christie,
Kasich, and Fiorina.
Will that be good enough for the Washington
machine?
Last time, the media kept me out of the
debate when I deserved to be in.
Will they try to silence me again on
Thursday?
We can't let them. We will not stand for it.
We need a strong show of support this week to
make sure everyone knows the liberty movement is stronger than
ever.
We deserve to be in the debate on Thursday.
We will win Iowa next week.
We will not be silenced.
Stand with me today and show your strong
support by donating $20.16.
In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Ben Carson
subject: We landed on the moon. This is next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33098438:Wy6ov4yNg:m:1:876315805:1565D4E7C6B43B94FA291F0FEE4D4A19:r)
---

Peter,

Not all that long ago, President Kennedy said he'd land an American on the moon. It brought together every part of America, from ordinary citizens to the highest levels of government.

**Today, it's time for a new space race for the 21st century, a cyber space race -- and I'm pleased to announce my plan for how America can win.**

The fact is, while digital communication and networking has revolutionized every aspect of our lives, it has also introduced new dangers. Whether it's data theft from the Chinese or cyberterrorism from non-state actors like ISIS and Al Qaeda, we must be vigilant and proactive in protecting the United States and all of its citizens.

Much like how NASA coordinated and unified America's space exploration efforts, a new National Cyber Security Administration (NCSA) will unify and drive a national effort to secure personal, private and government computers against the many threats facing the country. Rather than a new bureaucracy, this administration would streamline existing programs, consolidate efforts and eliminate stovepipes that hinder cooperation.

We must ensure that the Internet remains a sandbox for development and exploration; an open environment for communication, collaboration, and innovation.

As President, I will be committed to securing America in its use of the Internet without stifling the creativity and freedom that has enabled it to flourish.

This is a topic that you may not hear much about on the news, but it's extremely important that we get this right. Fortunately, I know there is no challenge too great when "We the People" set our minds to a solution.

[**Please stand with me for American leadership and security by making a donation today.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33098438:Wy6ov4yNg:m:1:876315805:1565D4E7C6B43B94FA291F0FEE4D4A19:r)

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Jeb Bush
subject: RE: My Official 2016 Announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Friend -- Over 6 months ago, I sent the below email after I announced I was running for President.

[**And now we 're here -- only 7 days away from when the first votes are cast -- and I need your help once again by contributing just $1 today.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kftkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzrlthr_wsnggzjf.html)

I told you in June that this wouldn't be easy, but the future of our country depended on this election.

That's even more true today. The stakes couldn't be higher.

[**Friend , now is the time. You stood with me then, and I'm asking you to stand with me today by chipping in just $1.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/upcbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjghyqn_wsnggzjf.html)

Everything we've accomplished together over the past six months is on the line right now.

We started this together, and we're going to win together, Friend.

**Please stand with me in these final 7 days before voting begins:[Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bcbkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnjpdlq_wsnggzjf.html)**

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dddkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbrtgpd_wsnggzjf.html)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: June 15, 2015
Subject: My Official 2016 Announcement:**

Friend,

President Obama has failed us. Hillary Clinton would fail us. We cannot afford another four years of the same failed policies. That's why I announced today that I'm running for President. [**That 's why I need your support right now**.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lwnpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjcldmzkq_wsnggzjf.html)

Under their watch, the economic recovery has been the slowest ever, debt has ballooned, and the American dream has been put out of reach for millions of families.

Friend, America deserves better. You deserve better, and I think you know it. [**If you 're ready for something better, I want you with me on Day One: make a donation right now and, be part of the team that will put America back on the right track**.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rtgfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbskcjrl_wsnggzjf.html)

I won't pretend that the challenges ahead aren't daunting. They are. But the stakes are high, and I know that if we give it everything we can, we will not fail.

**Together, we will expand opportunity for all, put government on the side of free enterprise and free people, and bring back American exceptionalism and leadership across the globe.**

This won't be easy. A campaign's not supposed to be.

[**But I am ready for this challenge. I hope you will stand with me on Day One and chip in $100, $50, or $25 today.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pmjtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgyhfjf_wsnggzjf.html)

The simple truth is this: the Democrats have offered a progressive agenda these past six years that includes everything but progress. **You and I know these past six years do not represent America 's best--that's why I'm running.** Our country is on a very bad course. We can't sit by and let this amazing nation be mismanaged and misled for another minute, much less another 4 years.

Today is about a new beginning. **Today, we launch a campaign to revive America and bring conservative leadership back to the White House.**

In this moment, I am focused on all the opportunities our society can extend to every American.

I am focused on all the dreams that this country can make reality.

I am focused on all the parents who will hand a life better than their own to their children because of what we will do together.

I hope you'll stand with me and make all of this possible: [**Jeb2016.com**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rgrfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbskcjnc_wsnggzjf.html)

I make you the promise here and now that I will campaign as I would serve: I will go everywhere, speak to everyone, keep my word, face the tough issues without flinching, and stay true to what I believe.

I will take nothing, and no one for granted. I will run with heart, and together, we will win.

**It begins now.**

I'm Jeb Bush, and I'm asking for your support on Day One: [**Jeb2016.com**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cctrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsgthpd_wsnggzjf.html)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/imgkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrbygvv_wsnggzjf.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=7888&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Team Sestak
subject: What's at stake
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17192e8/3476a20e/c4235d5/2744fc04/2008163053/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

"The Democrats cannot win the United States Senate without beating Pat Toomey." That's what Rob Gleason, the PA Republican Party Chairman, said yesterday about what's at stake in this race. And he's right - that's why **we need a candidate with the credentials to win.** In a dangerous world, there is a deficit in the Senate of national security expertise. As the highest ranking military officer ever elected to Congress, **no one in the Senate today - or running for the Senate - has the depth of national security qualifications that Admiral Sestak does to stand up and speak forcefully with the credibility to shape security decisions.** | [ ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17192e8/3476a20e/c4235d5/2744fc03/2008163053/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0125FBb1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
**But Joe also believes that national security actually begins at home. **
While he was in the Navy, **Joe 's daughter was diagnosed with brain cancer and he left the Navy to take care of her.** She recovered, but Joe knew the health insurance he had through the Navy wasn't available to many Americans so **he ran for Congress to expand access to health care.**
**And Joe fought in Congress for early childhood education funding for Head Start and Pre-K programs, and voted to increase Pell Grants and cut the interest rate on student loans in half.**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17192e8/3476a20e/c4235d5/2744fc02/2008163053/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0125FBb2&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
To take back the Senate, **we need a proven winner to defeat Pat Toomey.**
Joe won his congressional race**in a Republican district by 12 points, was re-elected by 20 points, and then beat a 30-year incumbent by 8 points** - all while servicing 18,000 constituent cases in 4 years as a Congressman. And when he left Congress, he turned down lobbying jobs to instead teach at PA colleges.
Protecting us abroad, fighting for our future at home, and winning where others could not. Contribute today to help Joe keep fighting for you!
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17192e8/3476a20e/c4235d5/2744fc01/2008163053/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0125FBb3&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
-Team Sestak

name: Corry Bliss
subject: BREAKING: Ted Strickland holds public event!
body:
| [](http://www.robportman.com/guarding_ohio_jobs_vs_ohio_lost_jobs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=public_event&n=1) Peter -- _**You won't believe this**_. Today, Ted Strickland is holding a public event that is open to the press! Yes, you read that correctly. We know these events are few and far between, so we understand your surprise. The truth is that Ted Strickland has been hiding for the last year -- hiding from his record, his primary opponent, and the media. Recently fellow Democrats and the media have called him "largely invisible" and a "ghost." His campaign has even been compared to a stealth aircraft -- "he's there, but you just can't see him." There is a stark contrast in this race -- and that's exactly what Ted doesn't want to talk about. He doesn't want to talk about Rob's fight to bring better and higher paying jobs to Ohio. Ted also doesn't want to talk about his own record of failing Ohio families -- when Ohio lost over 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation, or how he failed to pass a single bill into law while he was in Congress and was ranked as one of the most ineffective and absent members of Congress.

Now Ted wants to double down on the same failed policies that hurt Ohio families, raised taxes, caused healthcare costs to skyrocket, and crushed small businesses with burdensome regulations and take those failed policies to the Senate.
[](http://www.robportman.com/guarding_ohio_jobs_vs_ohio_lost_jobs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=public_event&n=2)
[Watch our two videos](http://www.robportman.com/guarding_ohio_jobs_vs_ohio_lost_jobs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=public_event&n=3) detailing the differences in this election and send them to 5 of your friends so Ohio voters will know that they cannot afford to let Retread Ted take them backwards again! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](robportman.com/donate) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=public_event&n=4)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=public_event&n=5)[

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: One week from Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
When we first launched our campaign, the polls in Iowa showed us down 55 points against Hillary Clinton. The political media dismissed us. They said our "radical ideas" would never attract much support against an "inevitable candidate."
But together we've built a campaign on the verge of accomplishing what everyone told us was impossible. The Iowa caucus takes place next Monday and the polls have us neck and neck.
The Clinton campaign is pouring in resources. Their Super PAC is launching attacks literally almost daily. Even so we have the largest grassroots organization of any campaign. So I have to ask directly:
Can I count on you to make a $10 contribution to our campaign today? You can do that here:
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/win-Iowa**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d42/43f17890/43cdfb1c/620e51a8/1444174396/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-week-until-iowa?refcode=em160125nd-full")
This moment requires us to think differently about our challenges. The same old establishment ideas won't do. But charting a new course will require the active participation of millions of Americans in every community in our country. And I know that if we stand together today, we will win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

body:
Peter --

The Iowa Caucuses are one week from today.

The Virginia Absentee Ballots are already in the mail.

People are voting NOW.

**What are you doing to Get Out the Vote for Donald Trump?**
Mr. Trump dominates the polls. If we do not Get Out the Vote (GOTV), we will not elect him to Make America Great Again!
The MidAtlantic Team has been given the opportunity to test new, faster, better, more efficient software for calling voters. **This week, we are calling into Iowa!** Next week, we’ll turn our sights back on Virginia, and then the other Mid Atlantic states.
If you want to try out the new, easier calling system...
If you want to Make America Great Again...
If you want to help win Iowa for Mr. Trump...

**It is time to start GOTV!**
Here are the simple steps to get started with GOTV
1. Visit [www.DonaldJTrump.com/Volunteer](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.DonaldJTrump.com%2FVolunteer&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_1_25&n=1) and select “Join a Phone Bank” and “Call from Home” under the volunteer preferences.

AND
2\. Email [Dena@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:Dena@DonaldTrump.com) with your name, email address and phone number
Or

Dates, cities and times are listed below, as well as at [https://www.facebook.com/vafortrump/events](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvafortrump%2Fevents&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_1_25&n=2).

[If you can volunteer on Election Day, register here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvirginiaprimaryfortrump.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_news_1_25&n=3).

We look forward to seeing you in person or online as we kick GOTV into high gear!

\- January 25th, 2016 -
# **Week In Review**
| Dear Peter, What a week! We traveled all over the country and met so many incredible voters in Virginia, Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada. I was also honored to receive some really important endorsements. The enthusiasm and momentum is amazing and it is so important we keep it going! We are one week away from the Iowa Caucus and if you don’t know your Caucus location you can visit [Donaldjtrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fiowa%2Fcaucus-finder%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_25_16_wir&n=3) to find out where you should be Monday night to show your support! Last Monday I spoke at Liberty University with a record crowd. It was an incredible day and I was so impressed with the school. Jerry Falwell Jr. delivered a beautiful introduction and I was really honored by the reception I received by so many students and supporters. _The record crowd at Liberty University_ That afternoon I traveled to Concord, New Hampshire for a rally with some great people. We have huge leads in all of the most recent New Hampshire polls and I look forward to visiting again [twice this week](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_25_16_wir&n=4). _The crowd showing their support in Concord, NH_ On Tuesday we traveled to Iowa and were endorsed by two really special people. First, in Winterset, Iowa, the birthplace of the legendary John Wayne, I received the endorsement of John’s daughter, Aissa. Later that day, I spoke at the Renewable Fuel Summit and discussed the importance of ethanol subsidies. _John Wayne's daughter, Aissa accompanying me in Winterset, IA_ _The Annual Renewable Fuel Summit_ We ended the day in Ames, Iowa where I was joined by Governor Sarah Palin who spoke about her enthusiastic support for my campaign and gave a resounding endorsement of my candidacy for President of the United States. I was really honored to be endorsed by Sarah who is an influential conservative leader and respected voice in the party. _Joined by Sarah Palin in Ames, IA_ On Wednesday we had another event in Norwalk, Iowa before traveling to Tulsa, Oklahoma. It was an honor to be joined by Sarah, who gave an amazing speech in Tulsa. We had 15,000 in attendance at the rally and it was a great event.
_The massive crowd in Tulsa, OK_ On Thursday I spoke to thousands at a rally in Las Vegas, Nevada. We are leading all the Nevada state polls and the reception was incredible. Later that day I attended the Outdoor Sportsman Awards with my sons Don Jr. and Eric. We are all proud members of the NRA and they are excellent marksmen who enjoy hunting, angling and more. In addition to Don and Eric, I was joined by Willie Robertson. Willie, star of Duck Dynasty, and a really successful guy with a wonderful family whom I greatly respect, endorsed me for President. His support means so much. _Me and Willie Robertson at the Outdoor Sportsman Awards_ On Friday I returned to Iowa and stayed in Sioux City before traveling to Sioux Center for an amazing event on Saturday. We had thousands in attendance and the speech was really well received by all. We then traveled to Pella, Iowa where we were met by another massive crowd! _Speaking to the crowd on Saturday in Iowa_ My weekend in Iowa ended in Muscatine, where I attended Sunday service at the First Presbyterian Church and then spoke to a great crowd at the Muscatine High School. _Leaving mass from the First Presbyterian Church before heading to the rally_ ___Greeting the crowd in Muscatine, IA_ The polls have been incredible! We are gaining support and momentum in all three early primary states and it is so important to vote! We are one week away from the Iowa Caucus and with your help and support I really feel I can make our country better than ever before. If you live in Iowa, be sure to find your Caucus location at [DonaldJTrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fiowa%2Fcaucus-finder%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_25_16_wir&n=5) and I look forward to seeing you in[ New Hampshire](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_25_16_wir&n=6), [South Carolina](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_25_16_wir&n=7) and beyond very soon. Together we will Make America Great Again! Best Wishes,
**Donald J. Trump**

That quote alone should convince you why Patrick must win Marco Rubio's seat back for Democrats -- and for commonsense gun violence prevention legislation.

Patrick and Elizabeth Warren are standing up for gun violence prevention measures this year. After the tragedies we see all too often around the country, Senators and candidates for president who refuse to engage meaningfully on stopping gun violence have no place in the White House or the Senate.

[**Will you stand with Patrick to replace Marco Rubio?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae221d/738133e4/3b773dc8/7f83bc8f/2109173602/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160125")

Bernie Sanders thinks there is one solution
to every problem: making government bigger.

at all. It's a sure-fire way to take away your rights and end
freedom as we know it.
Bernie and his friends may think their brand
of socialism is better, benign, because it is democratic. But
the truth of the matter is, the end result is all the same
whether you're voting in socialism or you're not.
And the end result is nothing short of
devastating.
I offered to debate Bernie Sanders this week
and he turned me down.
I wanted a real debate of socialism versus
capitalism. I wanted to truly defeat socialism for everyone to
see.
It's a failing idea - it's a bad plan - and
Americans deserve better.
On Twitter tonight I'll be taking the debate
to Sanders whether he's ready or not.
Will you tune in and help me defeat socialism
by donating today?
Let's show Bernie Americans are not going to

We don't need a big government watchdog. We
don't want a government baby sitter.
We want a hands-off government and we're
ready to fight for it.
Stand with me today.

In liberty,

Rand Paul

body:
| Dear Friend,

Despite the growing gun violence epidemic in our country, Republicans in Congress continue to prove that they care more about keeping the NRA happy than keeping our communities safe. Incredibly, Republicans in Congress have repeatedly blocked common sense gun reforms from even coming to a vote, despite the fact that polls show these measures have overwhelming public support across political parties and even in gun-owning households.

**[I urge you to stand with me today and demand that Congress respect the will of the people and permit a vote on gun safety reforms.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce7/70cdc2ba/47c71cb3/3965db5/2784831576/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/pass-gun-violence-prevention?source=em012516&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+I+urge+you+to+stand+with+me+today+and+de&utm_campaign=em012516")**

That's why I introduced the Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act, legislation that reduces gun violence by helping states implement licensing programs for the purchase of handguns similar to permits you need to drive a car.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I need you this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Remembering 2008 | Friend --

One week from today, Iowans will head to schools and firehouses (and in at least one precinct, their neighbors' living room) to make their voices heard in the Iowa caucus. We don't yet know what they'll say -- but we saw in 2008 just how profound an impact those voices can have.

Losing the Iowa caucus that year was incredibly difficult, but I learned from it, too: to dig in and stay focused, to draw strength from my team, and to never, ever stop fighting for everyone who’s ever been knocked down, but refused to be knocked out.

**[It's eight years later, and I'm not done fighting yet. Are you with me?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ1NTI3MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzNDQwNjk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We have a long road ahead from now until November, but I'm confident in our path, and I'm grateful to have you by my side. Our biggest hurdle yet lies one week from today. Right now, all I need to know is that you're with me.

**If you can, chip in $1 right now to say you're ready to win in Iowa, to win this nomination, and to win the White House. It's about more than money -- it's about standing together for our toughest phase yet:**

subject: USA Today’s pitiful, sad, disgusting lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

I can’t stand the media. From the start of this campaign, they’ve decided that we’re not worthy of them. They think it’s their job to anoint who they think should be the Republican nominee.

Seriously? The media determining the Republican nominee? **Give me a break!** We’ve pushed on and fought tooth and nail for coverage, but yesterday USA Today put the final straw on this camel’s back.

Enough with being a “statesman.” _We’re fighting back!_ They want to force us from the race, but that’s the last thing that will happen because next Monday night at the Iowa Caucus we’re going to force them to cover us. We’re going to force them to follow us to event after event after event all across America. Why? Because we’re going to blow their expectations out of the water. You read that right.

We’re going to shock the world again on February 1st. And USA Today and their buddies in the mainstream media won’t know what to do. But I need your help to do this. We need the resources to make this a reality. We have recruited hundreds of Caucus leaders. Our team on the ground has knocked on thousands of doors and we’ve made tens of thousands of phone calls. But we need to get over the finish line. _Can I count on you?

_ [**Friend, please give $25 to support this campaign!**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3Dusatoday&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=usa_today&n=1) Want to help me shove it to USA Today and the reporters like them that want to ignore us and our message of fighting for a better, stronger, and freer America? They want to hand this election to Hillary Clinton or even Bernie Sanders. They like socialism because it might prop up their failing media companies.
I say no!

[Join the fight with us today and lets take back America.
](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3Dusatoday&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=usa_today&n=2)
Game on! Rick Santorum

body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
There's no doubt you've seen it: over the course of the past few weeks, our campaign has faced a series of increasingly desperate attacks from the Clinton campaign and their super PACs.
But there's one reason we have been able to withstand the barrage while continuing to gain in the polls -- because our political revolution is powered by people like you. That's why we decided to put people - real people - front and center in one of our final ads before the Iowa caucus.
The ad has received rave reviews: "_Inspirational_ " \- "_The most effective campaign ad to date_ " \- "_Will make you feel things._ " But we want to know what you think.
[**Watch our ad, and if you agree that it 's an effective message to get in front of Iowa caucus-goers, contribute $3 to help us expand its reach.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2db7/43f17890/40671646/620e5a37/2871240586/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/watch-our-ad?refcode=em160125full")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2db7/43f17890/40671646/620e5a37/2871240586/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/watch-our-ad?refcode=em160125full")
Some of the recent polls in Iowa show us down just a few points. We believe getting this ad in front of people can help put us over the top. [**With just one week to go, your $3 will go directly towards helping us win the Iowa caucus.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2db7/43f17890/40671646/620e5a37/2871240586/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/watch-our-ad?refcode=em160125full")
Thank you for standing with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
